scope: SAFE file-level wiring per THE_HEALER_AND_BUGS_DEPARTMENT.md PART 7 + SYSTEM-INTEGRATION-STRATEGY.md; TIER-3 architecture items HELD

files_changed.change: Registered bugs dept (3 roster roles: bug-intake-clerk, bug-librarian, triage-dedup-analyst) + healer dept (1 roster role: chief-healer). Added FULL 8-field flat-array entries for all 4 standing roles + dept-healer-template (flat hygiene entry, NOT roster). role_type: bugs=specialist, healer roles=healer (never qc). Recomputed total_roles 277->281 and total_departments 20->22. Invariant total_roles==sum(dept role lists) holds.
files_changed.verified: JSON valid; library_lookup() resolves all 4 role headings to files via the real normalizer

files_changed.change: NEW file in exact presentations format (### N. Role). Headings resolve through _crw_library_lookup to the 3 bugs role files. Makes future clients materialize the bugs roster (build-workforce.py determine_specialists parses these headings).
files_changed.verified: build-workforce parser extracts 3 specialists; all resolve

files_changed.change: NEW file. Lists Chief Healer (the one real standing role file). Notes the QUAD dept-Healer template + the 3 unbuilt PART 3.2 roster roles as a gap so materialization never points at a missing file.
Added bugs + healer to mandatory (floor 26->28). version 2.4.0->2.5.0 + description updated. THE switch that makes both depts standard for every future client (Fable C3).
files_changed.verified: JSON valid; mandatory=21; floor computes 28 (21 mandatory + 7 universal primaries)

files_changed.change: Added bugs + healer to HARDCODED_MANDATORY fallback (now 21) + doc comment 26->28. evaluate_floor() derives the live floor from naming-map keys = 28.

QUAD: added make_healer_content() (instantiates PART 5 template, fills {{DEPARTMENT_NAME}}, role_type healer never qc, preserves WS-2 tokens), needs_healer_file(), healer_role_slug/filename(), and an OPT-IN --with-healer flag (DEFAULT OFF). Default trio runs touch NO healer files. Did NOT run --with-healer (the +20-agents propagation is operator-gated; HELD as T3-002).
files_changed.verified: py_compile OK; default dry-run = 0 healer mentions; --with-healer --dry-run lists per-dept files and writes nothing; make_healer_content produces 'The Healer -- Marketing' role_type healer; 0 stray healer-<dept>.md files written; _index.json untouched by script

files_changed.change: Added the ONE Healer-dependency interview question to Question Philosophy (asks per department: unusual outside tools/APIs/services the embedded Healer should watch). Seeds the Healer model+external-dependency census per PART 7.3.

Added ONE lean bug-filing line in the Rescue Rangers section per SOP 9.9 discipline: file a Bug Ticket (schema path given) to working/healer/bug_tickets/BUG-YYYYMMDD-NNN.json first, then stabilize. One line + pointer, no full protocol.

role_type canonicalization fix (Fable C1 verified bug): QC agent role_type 'QC Specialist' -> 'qc' (line ~268); Research agent 'Deep Research Specialist' -> 'deep-research' (line ~295). CC QC scorer queries agents.role_type='qc' lowercase; the human labels silently failed the lookup and degraded depts to heuristic QC. Added explanatory comments. devils-advocate left as-is (already lowercase, not Fable-named). Head agent has NO role_type field, so no Healer/head agent is ever stamped qc.
files_changed.verified: bash -n OK; only role_type qc/deep-research/devils-advocate present; the pre-existing em-dash on the unrelated research_name DISPLAY line is not mine (git diff shows 0 em-dashes on added lines)

tier3_notes.note: SAFE mapping documented: REPORTED=backlog, TRIAGED=assigned, HEALING=in_progress, VERIFYING=review, HEALED=done, REGRESSION WATCH=ledger+sweep, blocked=SLA breach. Ticket JSON ledger is source of truth, card is the view. No CC code/schema/manifest/master-SOP touched.
